paramWithoutType.message: When a variable decorated with '@Param' is not assigned a default value, it must also be decorated with '@Require'.
The property 'value' must specify a type.

monitorValidation.message: The '@Monitor' decorator needs to monitor the state variables that exist.

onceWithoutParam.message: When a variable decorated with '@Once', it must also be decorated with '@Param'.

componentReuseV2.message: Methods decorated with '@ComponentReuse' in '@ComponentV2' cannot have input parameters.

syncMonitorPatterns.message: Only constant expressions are supported as parameters in '@SyncMonitor'. Variables are not allowed.
In wildcard-based monitoring scenarios with '@SyncMonitor', the .* pattern must be placed at the end of the string.
